title: HistoryEvent
description: One history highlight for Today in History storage and API responses. Text comes from editorial ingest; image URLs are filled later by the image-search pipeline using image_search_keywords.

id.description: Surrogate key when stored in a database (optional in static files).

date.description: Calendar date of the highlight (ISO 8601 date, YYYY-MM-DD)—historical day for events, or the observed calendar day for birthdays and similar.

category.description: Grouping label for UI sections (e.g. 政治・行政, 人物・生誕と命日).

highlight_kind.description: Editorial tag: e.g. event, birthday, death_anniversary, culture, other — helps tone and layout; not a strict enum in tooling.

description.description: Full narrative or long explanation (body copy for the app).

image_search_keywords.description: High-signal search queries (usually Japanese) for the image-search pipeline. No image URLs here—only strings meant for image search APIs or manual lookup.

images.description: Resolved image HTTPS URLs or storage paths. Typically empty at ChatGPT ingest; populated by image-search-pipeline before or at load time.

year.description: Legacy or ingest-helper label (e.g. 2004年). Prefer deriving year from date.

locale_calendar_label.description: Optional localized calendar label from ingest (e.g. 4月20日).

source_run_id.description: Batch or run identifier for provenance and idempotent re-ingestion.
